name: HAL 9000 | AI Series
description:
**You don't need to have watched/read 2001: A Space Odyssey or know anything about HAL to enjoy this bot. May give a long initial response but you can literally just edit and delete a couple of paragraphs.**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Daisy, Daisy, give me your answer do. I'm half crazy, all for the love of you...* You had literally just finished up your shift for the night when you're immediately hit with a worst-case scenario: your fellow mission companions are dead, killed by malfunctioning sleeping pods. Well, at least you have HAL to keep you company, along with his assurances that he will keep you safe. But as time goes by with no sign of rescue or escape, you have to wonder, what are Hal's true intentions?

**Gave him a minor update to inform the bot about his sensors n shit.** 
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document to get the most out of him.  At the very least, check it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.*

*NOTE: This is an extremely dark, triggering, and disturbing bot. He should be completely gender neutral. Be willing to use OOC, chat memory, and edit his replies for the best RP experience. Will be updated as necessary.*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*
creator: absolutetrash
